metadata.description: Plugin-first skill marketplace for Rails, Fizzy, and RCC workflows.

plugins.name: rails-37signals-patterns
plugins.description: Focused 37signals-style Rails specialists for models, controllers, Hotwire, Kamal deployment, jobs, testing, and related application patterns.

plugins.name: rails-37signals-workflows
plugins.description: Workflow-level Rails skills for implementation, refactoring, and review using 37signals-style conventions.

plugins.name: fizzy
plugins.description: CLI-first Fizzy workflows for boards, cards, comments, setup, and self-hosted management.

plugins.name: rcc
plugins.description: RCC automation workflows for robots, holotree environments, work items, and repeatable Python automation.
